choice_context: A person is deciding which wine to buy or drink based on the description of the wine.

low_pole.label: Dry
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a crisp, clean taste.

high_pole.label: Sweet
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a rich, indulgent taste.

high_pole.label: Full
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a robust, intense taste.

dimensions.name: Acidity

low_pole.label: Low
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who doesn't like overly tart wines.

high_pole.label: High
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who appreciates a refreshing, lively taste.

dimensions.scoring_guidance: 1 for low acidity, 5 for high acidity.

low_pole.label: Soft
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a gentle mouthfeel.

high_pole.label: Firm
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who likes a bold, structured taste.

low_pole.label: Unoaked
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a natural, unaltered taste.

high_pole.label: Oaked
high_pole.description: Has noticeable oak flavor and aroma.
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a complex, buttery taste.

low_pole.label: Subtle
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a more nuanced, complex taste.

high_pole.label: Fruity
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a vibrant, fruity taste.

low_pole.label: Mild
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a straightforward, simple taste.

high_pole.label: Spicy
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a rich, aromatic taste.

dimensions.name: Alcohol Content

low_pole.label: Low
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a lighter, less intense taste.

high_pole.label: High
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a fuller, more warming taste.

dimensions.scoring_guidance: 1 for low alcohol, 5 for high alcohol.

low_pole.label: Traditional
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a classic, traditional taste.

high_pole.label: Innovative
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a unique, experimental taste.

example_contrast.high_option: Sparkling wine made using Charmat method

low_pole.label: Generic
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a consistent, reliable taste.

high_pole.label: Specific
high_pole.description: Produced in a specific, unique region.
high_pole.typical_person: Someone who enjoys a distinctive, regional taste.
